Now here is the exact step-by-step guide to make it permanently live for free: 🚀 How to Make Your Portfolio Live (GitHub Pages) Step 1 — Create a GitHub Repository Go to github.com and login Click the + button (top right) → New repository Name it exactly: ahmadali2622.github.io Set it to Public Click Create repository Step 2 — Upload Your Files Inside the new repo, click "uploading an existing file" Upload these 2 files: ahmad_portfolio_v3.html → rename it to index.html before uploading Your CV PDF (rename it to CV_Ahmad_Ali.pdf) Click Commit changes Step 3 — Enable GitHub Pages In the repo, go to Settings (top menu) Scroll down to "Pages" (left sidebar) Under Source, select main branch → / (root) folder Click Save Step 4 — Your Live Link is Ready! After 1–2 minutes, your portfolio will be live at: https://ahmadali2622.github.io This link never expires, it's always free, and you can update it anytime by uploading a new file. Step 5 — Add This Link Everywhere ✅ Put it on your CV (Portfolio field) ✅ Add it to your LinkedIn profile (Website section) ✅ Pin it to your GitHub profile One thing still needed from you: Share your GitHub repo link for the RAG Chatbot project so I can add the direct link to the chatbot project card. Right now it just goes to your main GitHub page.
